creator: krichter@posteo.de
text:
Invoking `freebsd-update upgrade` can fail with the very unspecific error message `Fetching 2 metadata files... failed`. The user should be informed about the reason for the failure (network failure, network timeout, remote file not available, etc.)

    # freebsd-update upgrade -r 9.3-RELEASE
    Looking up update.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 5 mirrors found.
    Fetching metadata signature for 9.2-RELEASE from update6.freebsd.org... done.
    Fetching metadata index... done.
    Fetching 2 metadata files... failed.
